title: microlicia frankii
intro: Microlicia frankii is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, allowing it to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Microlicia frankii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and even treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas or infusions, and it can also be found in tinctures or capsules for convenience and potency.
